hypothesis: The belief system is epistemically unhealthy: >30% of beliefs resist clean falsification
expect: 7+/21 beliefs (>30%) are UNFALSIFIABLE or PARTIALLY_FALSIFIABLE. Falsified if <=4/21 (<=19%).
actual: 15/24 active beliefs (62.5%) are PARTIALLY or UNFALSIFIABLE. Only 9/24 (37.5%) have concrete falsification criteria. 13 PARTIALLY, 2 UNFALSIFIABLE.
diff: Predicted >30%, found 62.5%. Much worse. The refinement process is the escape-hatch accrual mechanism — 10/13 PARTIALLY beliefs acquired escape hatches through challenge→REFINED cycles.
result: CONFIRMED — prediction holds. Belief system is epistemically unhealthy.
structural_insight: Challenge→REFINED cycle is a degenerative research programme (Lakatos 1970): hard core (PHIL-N label) protected by expanding belt of qualifiers. 10/13 PARTIALLY beliefs gained escape hatches through refinement.
prescription: Add falsifiability column to claims table. Each belief needs: concrete DROP criterion, measurable threshold, no undefined qualifiers.
